allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const pkgs = ['qrcode','qrcode.react','html5-qrcode','puppeteer','nodemailer','node-cron','cloudinary','multer','multer-storage-cloudinary']; pkgs.forEach\(pkg => console.log\(pkg + ': ' + \(deps[pkg] || 'MISSING'\)\)\)")
